collections.name: clients
rules: allow read, update, delete: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId;
allow create: if request.auth != null && request.resource.data.userId == request.auth.uid;

collections.name: projects
rules: allow read, update, delete: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId;
allow create: if request.auth != null && request.resource.data.userId == request.auth.uid;

collections.name: memos
rules: allow read, update, delete: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId;
allow create: if request.auth != null && request.resource.data.userId == request.auth.uid;
